package rulefixtures

// scenario for password_stored_as_plaintext: struct fields named `Password`, `Passwd`, or `Pwd` stored as `string` in database model structs without evidence of hashing
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: error.
type Rule728NegativeRecord struct {
	Email string
	PasswordHash []byte `json:"-" gorm:"column:password_hash"`
}
